title: <stateId>.intake-manifest.json — provenance + evidence for an imported (screenshot) reference
description: Written by `intake` alongside <stateId>.reference.png. Verify's imported-reference mode reads it for module resolution, gates, and staleness: notStale requires the live source sha256 AND the params hash to match (there is no re-render to self-heal with — a drifted source or re-declared transform fails loud). The content-box and theme-translation are upstream JUDGMENT inputs the CLI applied as a pure function.

module.description: Resolved via --module or the LONGEST matching config statePrefix — a frame-less state cannot use locateFrame, and the SUBJECT capture path derives from the module.

contentBox.description: Declared crop (foreign chrome exclusion). Null = full image.

targetWidthPx.description: viewport.logicalWidthCss × dpr — the canonical comparison width.

themeTranslation.description: Declared cross-theme translation. When light-to-dark, palette token pairing is SUPPRESSED (nearest-hex is systematically wrong across a theme boundary) and verify's grade instruction switches the color axis to role consistency.

paramsHash.description: Hash of the transform params — part of the staleness check together with sourceSha256.

naturalHeightPx.description: Pre-clip normalized height. When clipped, belowFold routes below-fold presence items to the Tier-2 gate.

gridPng.description: dp-grid overlay variant — a SEPARATE measuring image; never occludes the clean reference.

inventoryEnrolled.description: Whether stateId is in the state inventory (null = no inventory configured). Un-enrolled states escape the burndown and the `lint --fail-on-backfill` gate — enroll them.

ocr.description: Optional-dependency OCR sidecar status. ADVISORY evidence only — never authoritative over the raster.

palette.description: Deterministic color census + theme-gated nearest-token pairing (EVIDENCE for the model legs, never a decision).

tokenPairing.description: Null when no tokensSource is configured OR when theme-gated off (cross-theme).
